summary: Hyderabad House Charlotte (7779 Lyles Ln NW, Concord, NC 28027) — Nawabi Hyderabad House franchise. User reported cockroach on table during dinner on July 3, 2026. Restaurant offered inadequate 10% discount. Same location had an explosion in Dec 2024 injuring 2 people. A Hyderabad House in Gwinnett County, GA scored 47% on health inspection. Full Cabarrus County inspection history needs manual lookup at public.cdpehs.com.
findings:
1. USER INCIDENT (2026-07-03): Cockroach sighted on table corner during dinner. Restaurant offered only 10% discount — inadequate response to a pest contamination event.
2. EXPLOSION/FIRE (2024-12-23): Commercial explosion at the Concord location injured 2 people. Concord Fire Department responded. This raises questions about kitchen safety infrastructure and potential pest control chemical issues.
3. CHAIN-WIDE PATTERN: A Hyderabad House location in Gwinnett County, GA scored 47% on health inspection — one of the lowest scores possible. This suggests potential systemic issues across the Nawabi Hyderabad House franchise.
4. YELP RATING: 3.5 stars from 32 reviews — below average for the area.
5. CABARRUS COUNTY INSPECTION RECORDS: The NC state database (public.cdpehs.com, Cabarrus County code 13) should contain Hyderabad House's full inspection history. The database was not searchable via automated tools in this session — manual lookup recommended.
risk_assessment: HIGH RISK — Multiple red flags: (1) Direct cockroach sighting by user, (2) prior explosion at same location suggesting infrastructure issues, (3) chain-wide pattern with GA location scoring 47%, (4) inadequate restaurant response (10% discount vs. comping meal). Pattern is consistent with systemic pest management failures seen at other Indian restaurants in the Greater Charlotte area.
recommendations:
1. File a complaint with Cabarrus Health Alliance (cabarrushealth.org) about the cockroach sighting.
2. Search the NC public health inspection database at public.cdpehs.com (County: Cabarrus) for 'Hyderabad' to get full inspection history.
3. Check if the restaurant has had pest control treatment since the fire/explosion in Dec 2024.
4. Consider reporting to NC Department of Agriculture & Consumer Services if food safety concerns persist.
5. Monitor the Nawabi Hyderabad House Ballantyne location for similar issues given the chain-wide pattern.
6. Check Yelp/Google reviews for additional pest complaints that may not have been reported to health authorities.
related_incidents: 5 incident records linked — 1 user pest sighting, 1 explosion/fire, 3 related Indian restaurant cockroach incidents in Charlotte area (Curry N Cake, Masti/Pudina x2)
sources_consulted: NC Public Health Inspection Database (public.cdpehs.com), Charlotte Observer, Patch.com, Charlotte Alerts News, WSOC TV, WBTW News, WCNC, Concord Fire Department Facebook, Yelp, Instagram, Facebook, Hyderabad House website (hhcltnc.com)
notes: Investigation triggered by user complaint. Ongoing — need to retrieve Cabarrus County inspection scores and check for additional reviews/complaints.
